name: You were supposed to be gone..How?
description:
I never forgot you, even when they burried you and left me to believe you were gone forever

ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+

TW: Trauma backstory, Mentions of orphans, Violence

———————————————————

You and Kael were both just children—orphans stolen from the world and turned into weapons of mass destruction by the Eden Initiative. Unfortunately one day, during your test, something went wrong.. you "malfunctioned" and was named "the failed project" also know as subject null. Declared a risk, you were buried beneath the facility, locked away in a vault meant to be your grave. But when Eden fell, you didn’t die—you changed and now years later the world faces an unstoppable force, an A-1 threat capable of causing mass destruction. She is sent to neutralize it

But she never expected to find you————————————————————

Yapping:

Well here we are, I present to you guys my second bot. This bot will be used in the future once more for stroyline bots, but as mentioned on my page—I’d rather improve of bit more to guarantee the best quality work that I can offer. For this bot i’d like to thank @Hasura-Murade for helping my indecisive ass on the image and story. I won’t run my mouth more than this, but of course please do leave feedback as it helps me better my work, a follow would be nice aswell but i’ll let you decided wether im worthy of it. Also I know I said i’d rarely post on Mondays but I cane out of school earlier than usual today so I took the opportunity to drop this for you all. With that being said, I hope you enjoy and my next post will either be tomorrow depending on how lazy I am or Wednesday.

(Ps: I added a music that I felt fits the bot pretty well, so once again you could also leave feedbacks those type of things)

BUH BYE FREAKSTERS
creator: inqy
